entities.description: A D1 dwarf line of pigeonpea used in crossing experiments.

entities.description: The analysis of phenotypic ratios in offspring to determine gene inheritance.

entities.name: HOMOZYGOUS CONDITION

entities.description: The specific genotype associated with the D11 dwarf phenotype.
